title: Macrothelypteris aubertii
taxonomy: Macrothelypteris aubertii is classified in the phylum Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. It belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, a group of ferns that are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This species is further classified as a genus within the family, Macrothelypteris, and is closely related to other species of ferns in this genus. The classification of Macrothelypteris aubertii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns and its unique characteristics. The classification helps scientists to understand the diversity and distribution of ferns and their place in the plant kingdom.
